meta.title: The Space Force releases WILD X-37B pic from orbit
meta.description:
The X-37B is America's highly secretive space plane. Here's some info about what it is, and what it may be up to. 

Make sure to subscribe to Sandboxx to stay on top of all Defense tech news!
